summary:
I found the bug! In Python, array slicing `[start:end]` is exclusive of the `end` index. In `processor.py`, the `end` index was being calculated as `start + batch_size - 1`, which meant that every batch was missing its final element. 

I updated the slicing logic in `processor.py` to use `end = start + batch_size`. After running `test.sh`, the output shows all tests are now passing:

```
PASS: All records processed correctly across batch boundaries
```
